vocabulary.english: To go on a business trip
vocabulary.translation: I will go on a business trip in Beijing tomorrow

vocabulary.example: 出发前，别忘了检查登机牌和护照。
vocabulary.translation: Before setting off, don't forget to check your boarding pass and passport.

vocabulary.example: 你乘坐的航班号是什么？
vocabulary.translation: What's the flight number that you're taking?

vocabulary.example: 你乘坐的航班号是什么？
vocabulary.translation: What's the flight number that you're taking?

vocabulary.example: 我是来申请旅行签证的，导游说要带很多证明文件。
vocabulary.translation: I'm here to apply for a travel visa; the tour guide said I need to bring many supporting documents.

vocabulary.example: 飞机已经顺利降落，乘客们都松了一口气。
vocabulary.translation: The plane has landed safely; all the passengers breathed a sigh of relief.

vocabulary.example: 如果来不及申请签证，这次旅行就要推迟了。
vocabulary.translation: If there is no time to apply for a visa, this trip will have to be postponed.

vocabulary.example: 出发前，别忘了检查登机牌和护照。
vocabulary.translation: Before setting off, don't forget to check your boarding pass and passport.

vocabulary.example: 大使馆在高速公路旁边，从这里走大概二十分钟。
vocabulary.translation: The embassy is next to the highway; it's about a twenty-minute walk from here.

vocabulary.example: 她在陌生的城市迷路了，只好向路人求助。
vocabulary.translation: She got lost in the unfamiliar city and had to ask strangers for help.

vocabulary.example: 打扰一下，我好像迷路了，请问大使馆怎么走？
vocabulary.translation: Excuse me, I think I'm lost — how do I get to the embassy?

vocabulary.example: 乘坐高铁旅行，既快又舒适，是很多人的首选。
vocabulary.translation: Travelling by high-speed rail is both fast and comfortable, and is the first choice for many people.

vocabulary.english: To ask for help when lost
To return from a business trip

key_sentences.chinese: 我明天要出差，顺便去拜访一位老朋友。
key_sentences.pinyin: Wǒ míng tiān yào chū chāi, shùn biàn qù bài fǎng yí wèi lǎo péng yǒu.
key_sentences.english: I have a business trip tomorrow; I'll also take the chance to visit an old friend.

key_sentences.chinese: 飞机已经顺利降落，乘客们都松了一口气。
key_sentences.pinyin: Fēi jī yǐ jīng shùn lì jiàng luò, chéng kè men dōu sōng le yì kǒu qì.
key_sentences.english: The plane has landed safely; all the passengers breathed a sigh of relief.

key_sentences.chinese: 如果来不及申请签证，这次旅行就要推迟了。
key_sentences.pinyin: Rú guǒ lái bù jí shēn qǐng qiān zhèng, zhè cì lǚ xíng jiù yào tuī chí le.
key_sentences.english: If there is no time to apply for a visa, this trip will have to be postponed.

key_sentences.chinese: 她在陌生的城市迷路了，只好向路人求助。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā zài mò shēng de chéng shì mí lù le, zhǐ hǎo xiàng lù rén qiú zhù.
key_sentences.english: She got lost in the unfamiliar city and had to ask strangers for help.

key_sentences.chinese: 乘坐高铁旅行，既快又舒适，是很多人的首选。
key_sentences.pinyin: Chéng zuò gāo tiě lǚ xíng, jì kuài yòu shū shì, shì hěn duō rén de shǒu xuǎn.
key_sentences.english: Travelling by high-speed rail is both fast and comfortable, and is the first choice for many people.

key_sentences.chinese: 出发前，别忘了检查登机牌和护照。
key_sentences.pinyin: Chū fā qián, bié wàng le jiǎn chá dēng jī pái hé hù zhào.
key_sentences.english: Before setting off, don't forget to check your boarding pass and passport.

grammar_points.title: 顺便 — While you're at it / At the same time
grammar_points.explanation: 顺便 means to do something as a secondary action while doing something else — 'while you're at it' or 'in passing'. It is placed before the verb of the secondary action. Structure: main action + 顺便 + secondary action. Example: 我去超市，顺便给你买点东西。(I'm going to the supermarket; I'll pick something up for you while I'm at it.)

examples.chinese: 他去机场接朋友，顺便把行李也带过来了。
examples.pinyin: Tā qù jī chǎng jiē péng yǒu, shùn biàn bǎ xíng li yě dài guò lái le.
examples.english: He went to the airport to pick up his friend and brought the luggage over while he was at it.

examples.chinese: 我去大使馆办签证，顺便了解一下当地文化。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ qù dà shǐ guǎn bàn qiān zhèng, shùn biàn liǎo jiě yī xià dāng dì wén huà.
examples.english: I went to the embassy to handle the visa and also learned about the local culture while I was there.

exercises.question: 我去买登机牌，_____ 帮你问一下航班时间。
Choose the sentence that uses 顺便 correctly.
exercises.correct: 他出差，顺便去参观了当地的名胜。
options: 他出差，顺便去参观了当地的名胜。
顺便他出差，去参观了当地的名胜。
他出差去参观，顺便了当地的名胜。
他顺便，出差去参观了当地的名胜。
option_pinyin: Tā chū chāi, shùn biàn qù cān guān le dāng dì de míng shèng.
Shùn biàn tā chū chāi, qù cān guān le dāng dì de míng shèng.
Tā chū chāi qù cān guān, shùn biàn le dāng dì de míng shèng.
Tā shùn biàn, chū chāi qù cān guān le dāng dì de míng shèng.

exercises.question: What does 顺便 indicate in a sentence?
exercises.correct: Doing something extra while doing the main action
options: Doing something extra while doing the main action
Showing a contrast between two events

exercises.question: 她去导游公司预定行程，_____ 查看了签证要求。
Which position does 顺便 go in the sentence?
options: At the very beginning of the sentence
After the object of the sentence
At the end of the sentence

grammar_points.title: 来不及 / 来得及 — No time / Still have time
grammar_points.explanation: 来不及 means there is not enough time to do something. 来得及 means there is still time. Both are placed after the subject and before the action. Structure: Subject + 来不及/来得及 + verb. Example: 我们来不及赶飞机了。(We don't have time to catch the plane.) / 别急，还来得及。(Don't rush, there's still time.)

examples.chinese: 航班马上就要起飞了，我们来不及办理登机手续了。
examples.pinyin: Háng bān mǎ shàng jiù yào qǐ fēi le, wǒ men lái bù jí bàn lǐ dēng jī shǒu xù le.
examples.english: The flight is about to take off; we don't have time to check in anymore.

examples.chinese: 别担心，现在出发还来得及，航班还有两个小时。
examples.pinyin: Bié dān xīn, xiàn zài chū fā hái lái de jí, háng bān hái yǒu liǎng gè xiǎo shí.
examples.english: Don't worry, if we leave now there's still time; the flight is in two hours.

exercises.question: 飞机一小时后起飞，我们还 _____ 取登机牌吗？
签证还没申请，出发时间太近，我们 _____ 准备了。
Choose the correct sentence.
exercises.correct: 现在出发，还来得及赶上这趟航班。
options: 现在出发，还来得及赶上这趟航班。
现在出发，还来不及赶上这趟航班。
现在来得及出发，还赶上这趟航班。
现在还出发，来得及这趟航班赶上。
option_pinyin: Xiàn zài chū fā hái lái de jí gǎn shàng zhè tàng háng bān.
Xiàn zài chū fā hái lái bù jí gǎn shàng zhè tàng háng bān.
Xiàn zài lái de jí chū fā hái gǎn shàng zhè tàng háng bān.
Xiàn zài hái chū fā lái de jí zhè tàng háng bān gǎn shàng.

exercises.question: 导游说已经 _____ 改变路线了，必须走高速公路。

grammar_points.title: 推迟 — To postpone / To delay
grammar_points.explanation: 推迟 means to put something off to a later time. It is typically used with activities, events, or plans. Structure: Subject + 把 + plan + 推迟 + (到 + new time) / or Subject + 推迟 + verb phrase. Example: 会议推迟到下周了。(The meeting has been postponed to next week.) / 他们推迟了出发时间。(They delayed the departure time.)

examples.chinese: 由于天气原因，航班被推迟了两个小时。
examples.pinyin: Yóu yú tiān qì yuán yīn, háng bān bèi tuī chí le liǎng gè xiǎo shí.
examples.english: Due to weather conditions, the flight was delayed by two hours.

examples.chinese: 他们把旅行计划推迟到下个月，等签证办好再出发。
examples.pinyin: Tā men bǎ lǚ xíng jì huà tuī chí dào xià gè yuè, děng qiān zhèng bàn hǎo zài chū fā.
examples.english: They postponed their travel plan to next month, waiting until the visa is ready before departing.

exercises.question: 因为导游生病了，这次旅游只能 _____ 了。
Choose the correct use of 推迟.
option_pinyin: Huì yì tuī chí dào xià zhōu jǔ xíng.
Tuī chí huì yì dào xià zhōu jǔ xíng.
Huì yì dào xià zhōu tuī chí jǔ xíng.
Tuī chí dào xià zhōu, huì yì jǔ xíng.

exercises.question: 他没来得及申请签证，所以只好把出差 _____ 了。
Which structure is correct with 推迟?
option_pinyin: bǎ jì huà tuī chí dào xià zhōu
tuī chí bǎ jì huà dào xià zhōu
dào xià zhōu bǎ tuī chí jì huà
jì huà bǎ dào xià zhōu tuī chí

culture_notes.title: China's High-Speed Rail — The World's Largest Network
culture_notes.title_chinese: 中国高铁——世界最大铁路网
culture_notes.content: China operates the world's largest high-speed rail (高铁, gāo tiě) network, spanning over 40,000 kilometres. Trains such as the 复兴号 (Fùxīng Hào, 'Rejuvenation') reach speeds of up to 350 km/h, connecting major cities across the country in hours rather than days. The network has transformed domestic travel, often making high-speed rail a faster and more convenient alternative to flying for distances under 1,000 km. Passengers appreciate the spacious seats, punctuality, and city-centre stations that eliminate the need for long airport commutes. The expansion of 高铁 reflects China's broader push for modern infrastructure and has become a source of national pride.

idioms.english: Have a smooth journey (a common farewell to travellers)

quiz.question: What does 出差 mean?
quiz.correct: To go on a business trip
options: To go on a business trip

quiz.question: What does 顺便 mean in a sentence?
quiz.correct: While you're at it; doing something extra in passing
options: While you're at it; doing something extra in passing
In order to achieve a goal

quiz.question: Fill in the blank: 签证还没办，我们 _____ 赶上这次旅行了。
Choose the correct sentence using 推迟.
quiz.correct: 由于天气，航班被推迟了。
options: 由于天气，航班被推迟了。
由于天气，航班推迟被了。
航班由于天气，推迟被了。
航班推迟，由于天气被了。

quiz.question: What does the phrase 旅行计划 mean?
Fill in the blank: 去机场前，他 _____ 在银行取了钱。
Which phrase means 'to apply for a visa'?
China's high-speed train 复兴号 can reach a speed of up to:
What does the phrase 出差归来 mean?
quiz.correct: To return from a business trip
options: To return from a business trip
To leave on a business trip
To get lost on a trip

quiz.question: Which grammar pattern means 'while you're at it'?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 您好，我的航班是CA302，请问还来得及办理登机手续吗？
lines.pinyin: Nín hǎo, wǒ de háng bān shì CA302, qǐng wèn hái lái de jí bàn lǐ dēng jī shǒu xù ma?
lines.english: Hello, my flight is CA302. Is there still time to check in?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 来得及，还有四十分钟。请把您的登机牌和护照给我看一下。
lines.pinyin: Lái de jí, hái yǒu sì shí fēn zhōng. Qǐng bǎ nín de dēng jī pái hé hù zhào gěi wǒ kàn yī xià.
lines.english: Yes, there are still forty minutes. Please show me your boarding pass and passport.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 好的，给您。我这次是出差，签证是公司帮我申请的。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, gěi nín. Wǒ zhè cì shì chū chāi, qiān zhèng shì gōng sī bāng wǒ shēn qǐng de.
lines.english: Here you are. I'm on a business trip this time; the company applied for the visa on my behalf.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 明白了。请问您有几件行李要托运？
lines.pinyin: Míng bai le. Qǐng wèn nín yǒu jǐ jiàn xíng li yào tuō yùn?
lines.english: I see. How many bags would you like to check in?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 只有一件。对了，我想顺便问一下，飞机会准时出发吗？
lines.pinyin: Zhǐ yǒu yī jiàn. Duì le, wǒ xiǎng shùn biàn wèn yī xià, fēi jī huì zhǔn shí chū fā ma?
lines.english: Just one. By the way, I'd like to ask — will the plane depart on time?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 目前没有推迟，预计准时起飞。祝您旅行顺利！
lines.pinyin: Mù qián méi yǒu tuī chí, yù jì zhǔn shí qǐ fēi. Zhù nín lǚ xíng shùn lì!
lines.english: There are no delays at the moment; it is expected to take off on time. Have a smooth trip!

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 太好了，谢谢您！希望能顺利降落，平安抵达。
lines.pinyin: Tài hǎo le, xiè xie nín! Xī wàng néng shùn lì jiàng luò, píng ān dǐ dá.
lines.english: Great, thank you! I hope we land safely and arrive without any problems.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 打扰一下，我好像迷路了。请问大使馆怎么走？
lines.pinyin: Dǎ rǎo yī xià, wǒ hǎo xiàng mí lù le. Qǐng wèn dà shǐ guǎn zěn me zǒu?
lines.english: Excuse me, I think I'm lost. How do I get to the embassy?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 大使馆在高速公路旁边，从这里走大概二十分钟。
lines.pinyin: Dà shǐ guǎn zài gāo sù gōng lù páng biān, cóng zhè lǐ zǒu dà gài èr shí fēn zhōng.
lines.english: The embassy is next to the highway; it's about a twenty-minute walk from here.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我乘坐地铁来的，没想到出站口找错了，就迷路了。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ chéng zuò dì tiě lái de, méi xiǎng dào chū zhàn kǒu zhǎo cuò le, jiù mí lù le.
lines.english: I came by subway but accidentally took the wrong exit and got lost.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 没关系。你可以先坐公共汽车到高速公路出口，再步行五分钟。
lines.pinyin: Méi guān xi. Nǐ kě yǐ xiān zuò gōng gòng qì chē dào gāo sù gōng lù chū kǒu, zài bù xíng wǔ fēn zhōng.
lines.english: No problem. You can take a bus to the highway exit and then walk five minutes.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我是来申请旅行签证的，导游说要带很多证明文件。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ shì lái shēn qǐng lǚ xíng qiān zhèng de, dǎo yóu shuō yào dài hěn duō zhèng míng wén jiàn.
lines.english: I'm here to apply for a travel visa; the tour guide said I need to bring many supporting documents.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 那你要抓紧时间，大使馆下午五点关门，来不及的话就要明天再来了。
lines.pinyin: Nà nǐ yào zhuā jǐn shí jiān, dà shǐ guǎn xià wǔ wǔ diǎn guān mén, lái bù jí de huà jiù yào míng tiān zài lái le.
lines.english: Then you should hurry; the embassy closes at 5 p.m. If you run out of time, you'll have to come back tomorrow.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 谢谢您！我这就出发，希望还来得及！
lines.pinyin: Xiè xie nín! Wǒ zhè jiù chū fā, xī wàng hái lái de jí!
lines.english: Thank you! I'll head off right now — I hope there's still time!
